parents.subject: LU-19249 build: Compatibility updates for kernel v6.16

commit.subject: LU-19244 deb: fix perms and install path for resource agents
commit.message:
LU-19244 deb: fix perms and install path for resource agents

lustre/conf/resource/Makefile.am treats the pacemaker resource agent
scripts as data and not as scripts.
debian/lustre-resource-agents.install had a typo in the target
directory

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Ake Sandgren <ake.sandgren@hpc2n.umu.se>
Change-Id: Ib9bc6de4480ad76721bab7c7118b4dca7447c466
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60575
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
